headlines.description: Liverpool fought back from a goal down to claim a 3-1 victory at LASK Linz on Thursday in their first appearance in the Europa League in eight seasons.
headlines.shortLinkText: Liverpool fight back to beat Linz to start UEL

name: AEK Athens at Brighton & Hove Albion
Sporting CP at SK Sturm Graz
FK TSC at West Ham United

headlines.description: An own goal by Backa Topola's Nemanja Petrovic helped West Ham United recover from a goal down to clinch a 3-1 home win over the Serbian side in a Europa League Group A match on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: West Ham beat Serbia's Backa Topola 3-1

headlines.description: Brighton & Hove Albion struck twice in the second half, including a late penalty, to recover from two goals down and grab a 2-2 draw at Olympique de Marseille in an entertaining Europa League Group B game on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brighton stage late comeback to draw with Marseille

name: SK Sturm Graz at Raków Czestochowa
West Ham United at SC Freiburg

headlines.description: West Ham United manager David Moyes said he was proud of his side after their 2-1 Europa League win over Freiburg extended their unbeaten run in Europe to an English record 17 games.
headlines.shortLinkText: Moyes delighted with West Ham's unbeaten run in Europe

headlines.description: Ryan Gravenberch scored his first Liverpool goal to give his side a hard-fought 2-0 win over the visiting Union St.-Gilloise in their Europa League clash at Anfield on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Gravenberch leads Liverpool to tough UEL win

headlines.description: Olympique de Marseille secured a 3-1 home victory against AEK Athens in an entertaining Europa League Group B match on Thursday that featured a red card for the visiting goalkeeper and two goals from the penalty spot.
headlines.shortLinkText: Marseille ease past 10-man AEK Athens

name: Ajax Amsterdam at Brighton & Hove Albion

headlines.description: Liverpool thrashed Toulouse 5-1 at Anfield on Thursday, asserting their control over their Europa League section with a perfect record at the halfway mark of the group stage.
headlines.shortLinkText: Liverpool hit 5 past Toulouse in Europa League

name: Brighton & Hove Albion at Ajax Amsterdam

headlines.description: Liverpool suffered a dramatic 3-2 loss at French side Toulouse in Europa League Group E on Thursday after the English side had a potential equaliser ruled out in the final minute of added time.
headlines.shortLinkText: Toulouse hand Liverpool first Europa League loss

headlines.description: West Ham United's Lucas Paqueta scored a late goal to earn his side a 1-0 home win over Olympiakos Piraeus as they retained top spot in Europa League Group A, while Olympique de Marseille won 2-0 at AEK Athens to remain first in Group B on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: West Ham secure late win over Olympiakos

name: Brighton & Hove Albion at AEK Athens
West Ham United at FK TSC

headlines.description: West Ham United secured a top-two finish in Europa League Group A after Tomas Soucek scored a late goal to secure a 1-0 win over Backa Topola in Serbia on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: West Ham win to advance in Europa League

name: Raków Czestochowa at SK Sturm Graz

headlines.description: Liverpool eased into the Europa League round of 16 with a 4-0 home win over Austria's LASK in Group E on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Gakpo nets 2 as Liverpool clinch UEL knockouts

headlines.description: AS Roma finished second in Europa League Group G after beating Moldovan side Sheriff Tiraspol 3-0 on Thursday, courtesy of first-half goals from Romelu Lukaku and Andrea Belotti and a late strike by Niccolo Pisilli.
headlines.shortLinkText: Roma end 2nd in UEL group after beating Sheriff

headlines.description: An inexperienced Liverpool side rounded out their Europa League group-stage campaign with a 2-1 loss to Union St.-Gilloise in Belgium on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Liverpool end UEL group with loss to Union

headlines.description: Joao Pedro's late goal earned Brighton & Hove Albion a dramatic 1-0 win over Marseille on Thursday to secure the hosts top spot in Europa League Group B.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brighton seal historic Europa League last-16 spot

name: SK Sturm Graz at Sporting CP
SC Freiburg at West Ham United

headlines.description: Striker Romelu Lukaku showed his strength to force home the equaliser as AS Roma held Feyenoord to a 1-1 draw in the first leg of their Europa League playoff tie on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lukaku earns Roma draw at Feyenoord

headlines.description: Ruben Loftus-Cheek scored two headers and Rafael Leão added a third as AC Milan secured an emphatic 3-0 home win over French side Stade Rennais in the first leg of their Europa League playoff tie on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Loftus-Cheek brace leads Milan rout of Rennes

notes.text: 2nd Leg - FK Qarabag advance 6-5 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - FK Qarabag advance 6-5 on aggregate

notes.text: 2nd Leg - SC Freiburg advance 3-2 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - SC Freiburg advance 3-2 on aggregate

notes.text: 2nd Leg - AC Milan advance 5-3 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - AC Milan advance 5-3 on aggregate

headlines.description: AC Milan reached the Europa League round of 16 despite a 3-2 loss at Stade Rennais on Thursday as Benjamin Bourigeaud's hat trick was not enough for the hosts to stop the Italian side completing a 5-3 aggregate victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Milan hold off Rennes to reach UEL last 16

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Tied on aggregate - AS Roma advance 4-2 on penalties
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Tied on aggregate - AS Roma advance 4-2 on penalties

headlines.description: AS Roma beat Feyenoord 4-2 on penalties to advance to the Europa League last 16 on Thursday following a 1-1 draw after extra time in a repeat of the first-leg result.
headlines.shortLinkText: Roma sink Feyenoord in Europa shootout reach round of 16

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Sparta Prague advance 6-4 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Sparta Prague advance 6-4 on aggregate

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Sporting CP advance 4-2 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Sporting CP advance 4-2 on aggregate

name: Brighton & Hove Albion at AS Roma

headlines.description: An early penalty by Alexis Mac Allister and a Darwin Nunez brace helped Liverpool to thrash Sparta Prague 5-1 in the first leg of their Europa League last-16 tie on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Liverpool smash Sparta Prague with Nunez brace

headlines.description: AC Milan battled to a 4-2 win over Slavia Prague in an entertaining first leg of their Europa League last-16 tie at San Siro Stadium on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pulisic scores as Milan double up Slavia Prague

name: West Ham United at SC Freiburg

notes.text: 2nd Leg - AC Milan advance 7-3 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - AC Milan advance 7-3 on aggregate

headlines.description: AC Milan eased into the Europa League quarter-finals with a 3-1 away victory over 10-man Slavia Prague on Thursday to secure a 7-3 aggregate win.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pulisic nets as Milan seal Europa quarters place

name: SC Freiburg at West Ham United

notes.text: 2nd Leg - West Ham United advance 5-1 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - West Ham United advance 5-1 on aggregate

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Bayer Leverkusen advance 5-4 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Bayer Leverkusen advance 5-4 on aggregate

name: AS Roma at Brighton & Hove Albion

notes.text: 2nd Leg - AS Roma advance 4-1 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - AS Roma advance 4-1 on aggregate

headlines.description: Mohamed Salah made history for Liverpool as Jurgen Klopp's side hammered Sparta Prague 6-1 on Thursday to storm into the Europa League quarterfinals 11-2 on aggregate.
headlines.shortLinkText: Salah makes Liverpool history in 6-1 UEL rout

headlines.description: AS Roma rode a Gianluca Mancini goal to a 1-0 win over AC Milan in the first leg of their Europa League quarterfinal at San Siro on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Roma beat AC Milan at San Siro in UEL 1st leg

name: West Ham United at Bayer Leverkusen

headlines.description: Late strikes by Bayer Leverkusen substitutes Jonas Hofmann and Victor Boniface earned the Bundesliga leaders a 2-0 home win over West Ham United in their Europa League quarterfinal first leg.
headlines.shortLinkText: Unbeaten Bayer net late to take down West Ham

headlines.description: Liverpool slumped to a shock 3-0 home defeat by Atalanta on Thursday as Gianluca Scamacca struck twice for the Italian side in their Europa League quarterfinal first leg.
headlines.shortLinkText: Liverpool stunned by Atalanta in Anfield thrashing

notes.text: 2nd Leg - AS Roma advance 3-1 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - AS Roma advance 3-1 on aggregate

headlines.description: AS Roma beat AC Milan 2-1 on Thursday to complete a 3-1 aggregate win and set up a semifinal showdown with Bundesliga champions Bayer Leverkusen in the Europa League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ten-man Roma ease past Milan to make Europa semis

headlines.description: Atalanta progressed to the Europa League semifinals despite losing 1-0 to Liverpool on Thursday as they triumphed 3-1 on aggregate to move one step closer to a first ever European final for the Serie A side.
headlines.shortLinkText: Liverpool comeback falls short as Atalanta make SF

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Tied on aggregate - Marseille advance 4-2 on penalties
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Tied on aggregate - Marseille advance 4-2 on penalties

headlines.description: Marseille claimed a penalty shootout win over Benfica on Thursday to reach the Europa League semi-finals after Faris Moumbagna's late second-half goal levelled the tie at 2-2 on aggregate.
headlines.shortLinkText: Marseille edge Benfica on penalties to reach UEL semis

name: Bayer Leverkusen at West Ham United

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Bayer Leverkusen advance 3-1 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Bayer Leverkusen advance 3-1 on aggregate

headlines.description: Newly-crowned Bundesliga champions Bayer Leverkusen reached the Europa League semi-finals but almost lost their season-long unbeaten record as they drew 1-1 away at West Ham United for a 3-1 aggregate victory on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bayer rally puts streak at 44, on to Europa semis

headlines.description: Goals by Florian Wirtz and Robert Andrich gave Bayer Leverkusen a 2-0 advantage over AS Roma in the first leg of their Europa League semi-final on Thursday as the German champions edged closer to their first European final in 22 years.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leverkusen blank Roma, unbeaten run now at 47

headlines.description: Olympique de Marseille were held to a 1-1 home draw by Atalanta in their Europa League semi-final first leg on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Atalanta rescue a draw at Marseille in UEL semi

headlines.description: Atalanta made history on Thursday after beating 3-0 Olympique de Marseille in the second leg of the Europa League semifinal to seal their place in a European final for the first time in the club's history.
headlines.shortLinkText: Atalanta advance to first-ever European final

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Bayer Leverkusen advance 4-2 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Bayer Leverkusen advance 4-2 on aggregate

headlines.description: Bayer Leverkusen staged a late comeback to move into the Europa League final with a 2-2 draw at home against AS Roma on Thursday to win 4-2 on aggregate as they set the longest unbeaten run in all competitions including European matches.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leverkusen makes UEL final, streak at record 49

headlines.description: A stunning Ademola Lookman hat-trick handed Atalanta the Europa League title on Wednesday, just the second major trophy in their 117-year history after a 3-0 win over Bayer Leverkusen that ended the German champions' remarkable unbeaten streak.
headlines.shortLinkText: Atalanta win Europa League on Lookman hat trick
